_comment: Common object pairings. Claude should suggest companions when using these objects.

pairs.note: tapin~ always needs tapout~ to read the delay buffer
Audio bus send/receive -- names must match
Control bus send/receive -- names must match
stripnote removes note-off messages from notein
loadbang often feeds trigger for initialization fan-out
groove~ reads from buffer~ with loop control
wave~ reads from buffer~ with phasor input
index~ reads from buffer~ by sample index
phasor~ drives wave~ for wavetable synthesis
function can visually edit adsr~ parameters
ezdac~ is dac~ with UI toggle
ezadc~ is adc~ with UI toggle
line~ for smoothing, *~ for gain control
snapshot~ converts signal to control, number displays it
thispoly~ must exist inside poly~ subpatcher for voice management
fftin~/fftout~ must exist inside pfft~ subpatcher
